ItacAcademyItem.Name: Aspiranti (Accademie degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: This academy was concerned with literary publication and may have opened a press or had connections with the printer Angelo Tamo in Verona. For a reference to the Aspiranti academy see Giuseppe Venuti, Compendio della storia sacra e profana di Verona, Verona, 1825 (British Library Shelfmark: General Reference Collection 10130.f.10.).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
